result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates table and indexes in MySQL Server database to be used for distributed caching

Usage:
  dotnet-mysql-cache [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  create <connectionString> <tableName>  Creates table and indexes in MySQL Server database to be used for distributed caching
  script <tableName>                     Generate creation script

Description:
  Creates table and indexes in MySQL Server database to be used for distributed caching

Usage:
  dotnet-mysql-cache [command] [options]

Options:

  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  create <connectionString> <tableName>  Creates table and indexes in MySQL Server database to be used for distributed caching
  script <tableName>                     Generate creation script

result.stdout:
Description:
  Creates table and indexes in MySQL Server database to be used for distributed caching

Usage:
  dotnet-mysql-cache create <connectionString> <tableName> [options]

Arguments:
  <connectionString>  The connection string to connect to the database.
  <tableName>         Name of the table to be created.

Options:
  -d, --databaseName <databaseName>  Name of the database. If not existing or set in connection string.
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information
